ground_truth.title: [2025] Massive List of Thousands of Free Certificates and Badges
ground_truth.author: Rui Ma
ground_truth.main_content: In this article, read by over 10 million people, Class Central has compiled the single largest collection of free certificate courses available online. Certificates can motivate learners to complete online courses. When the modern online course movement began, platforms such as Coursera and edX offered free certificates. But by 2015, these had largely been replaced by paid ones. Fortunately, a few universities including Harvard and Stanford still offer some free certificates. And so do some platforms like OpenLearn and LinkedIn Learning. Finally, Google, MATLAB, and other companies also started offering free certificates to promote their products. Free certificates can be hard to find. So we compiled them all here, testing each platform, and earning a few certificates ourselves along the way. Google offers over 450 courses with free certificates and badges covering topics such as digital marketing, Google Analytics, and Google Cloud. Harvard offers 10 online courses with free certificates including the popular CS50 Introduction to Computer Science. Stanford Medicine offers 200+ medical courses with free certificates and CME credit. LinkedIn Learning offers 470+ hours of free online learning with certificates across business, design, and technology. The Open University offers 900+ free certificate courses via OpenLearn. Semrush Academy offers 80 courses with free certificates on marketing and SEO. CodeSignal offers 2000+ courses with free certificates in coding, AI & ML, data science, and interview prep. freeCodeCamp offers 1000+ hours of free certificates on web development, programming, and data science. Various other platforms including IBM, MATLAB, Kaggle, FutureLearn, HubSpot, and many more also offer free certificates.
with: In this article, read by over 10 million people, Class Central has compiled the single largest collection of free certificate courses available online.
Certificates can motivate learners to complete online courses. When the modern online course movement began, platforms such as Coursera and edX offered free certificates.
From Gmail to Maps, Google offers a ton of useful apps. What many people don't know is that Google also offers numerous online courses — and some of them include a free certificate or badge!
Class Central's @manoel wrote a comprehensive guide explaining how to earn a free certificate in CS50, Harvard's Introduction to Computer Science.
freeCodeCamp is a nonprofit that can teach you how to code online for free. It includes thousands of hours of learning content exploring topics ranging from web development to machine learning.
without: Your source for the latest news and trends in online education.
Disclosure: Class Central is learner-supported. When you buy through links on our site, we may earn an affiliate commission.
Learn proven tactics and strategies from top marketing experts. Enroll for free.
Class Central is not involved in running the courses or issuing certificates.
Please note, Class Central is not involved in running the courses or issuing certificates. This is a dynamic field and you may discover that a course you choose is no longer available.
